mapper.insert: insert into account ( userid, account_number, owner_name, balance ) values ( #{userid}, #{accountNumber}, #{ownerName}, 0 )
mapper.select: select id, userid, account_number as accountNumber, owner_name as ownerName, balance from account where userid = #{userid}
select id, userid, account_number as accountNumber, owner_name as ownerName, balance from account where userid = #{userid} for update
